title: Merge canonical R1 parallel outputs and compute full gate verdict
objective: Create the minimum merge step required to turn completed parallel R1 worker outputs into a root-level aggregate-ready output set, then run the canonical gate audit on the full completed run.
definition_of_done: The merge step creates a root-level run index and resolved manifest from completed worker outputs.
The canonical aggregate gate audit runs successfully on the merged full output root.
The resulting verdict is documented without overclaiming beyond the R1 gate contract.
notes: Do not rewrite or mutate worker-level scientific outputs.
Only add the minimum root-level merge artifacts required for canonical aggregation.
